headline: A Look At Novavax (NVAX) Valuation As It Shifts To Licensing And Awaits Combo Vaccine Data
summary: Novavax (NVAX) is in focus after outlining a move toward a licensing and royalty model, supported by partnerships with Sanofi and Pfizer, while investors watch for a Phase 3 COVID influenza combo readout. See our latest analysis for Novavax. The licensing pivot and upcoming COVID influenza combo catalyst come after a mixed period for investors, with a 12.76% year-to-date share price return alongside a 25.43% one-year total shareholder return, but a very large five-year total shareholder loss...
